description: Built and maintained the full backend infrastructure for a social event platform. Architected 11 core modules using NestJS, integrated PostgreSQL and Redis, and deployed on Render with Aiven cloud services.
Founded and registered a technology company focused on building software products and providing engineering services. RC-8203175.
Designed and developed the chamber's website using WordPress, Elementor, and Astra theme. Integrated event management via the My Calendar plugin.
